rules.test: not(ram:TypeCode) or (self::ram:AdditionalReferencedDocument) and (ram:TypeCode='50' or ram:TypeCode='130' or ram:TypeCode='916')

(not(ram:BuyerTradeParty/ram:ID) and ram:BuyerTradeParty/ram:GlobalID) or (ram:BuyerTradeParty/ram:ID and not(ram:BuyerTradeParty/ram:GlobalID)) or (not(ram:BuyerTradeParty/ram:ID) and not(ram:BuyerTradeParty/ram:GlobalID))

(not(ram:PayeeTradeParty/ram:ID) and ram:PayeeTradeParty/ram:GlobalID) or (ram:PayeeTradeParty/ram:ID and not(ram:PayeeTradeParty/ram:GlobalID)) or (not(ram:PayeeTradeParty/ram:ID) and not(ram:PayeeTradeParty/ram:GlobalID))
